title: lagophylla minor
intro: Lagophylla minor, also known as the dwarf lamb's tail or lagophylla, is a small shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lagophylla minor include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Lagophylla minor is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is also used in poultices and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
